errors.description: The evidence chain entry is missing a canonical previous chain hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence chain verification until previous hash continuity is present

errors.description: The evidence chain entry is missing a canonical current manifest or evidence hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence chain verification until current manifest hash continuity is present

errors.description: The evidence chain entry position is malformed or not sequential.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence chain verification until append-only position ordering is proven

errors.description: The evidence chain contains a repeated entry or repeated WORM manifest hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence chain verification because replayed evidence was detected

errors.description: The evidence chain previous/current hash linkage is broken.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence chain verification until continuity is cryptographically restored

errors.description: The evidence chain contains unsafe diagnostics or redaction-sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence chain verification until no secrets or raw approvals are present
